svg.title: ECG arrhythmia detection MLOps pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from data ingestion through model serving and monitoring, organized in five layers.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the data ingestion step for the ECG project')
sendPrompt('What does the preprocessing pipeline do for ECG signals?')
sendPrompt('How does DVC handle data versioning in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the CNN-BiLSTM architecture look like for ECG classification?')
sendPrompt('What hyperparameters and experiments would I track in MLflow?')
sendPrompt('What evaluation metrics matter most for arrhythmia detection?')
sendPrompt('How does the MLflow model registry work for staging and production?')
sendPrompt('How does Docker containerization work in the serving layer?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints would the FastAPI inference service expose?')
sendPrompt('What does the Gradio demo show for the ECG project?')
sendPrompt('What does the clinical dashboard show in the ECG project?')
sendPrompt('How would I implement data drift monitoring for the ECG model?')
sendPrompt('How does CI/CD with GitHub Actions work for an ML project?')
sendPrompt('How would I deploy this to AWS ECS or a cloud service?')
